services.name: OpenAI
services.tagline: GPT, Whisper, TTS, embeddings, and VLM-OCR
services.description: Official OpenAI platform supporting GPT and embedding models, Whisper transcription, TTS speech, and vision-LLM OCR.

services.name: Anthropic
services.description: Claude Opus, Sonnet and Haiku connected through the OpenAI-compatible adapter.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.tagline: OpenAI models, Whisper, TTS on Microsoft Azure
services.description: Enterprise-managed OpenAI deployments — chat, embeddings, audio (Whisper / TTS), and VLM-OCR.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock
services.tagline: Anthropic, Nova, AI21 and more on AWS
services.description: Bedrock Converse API with chat, embeddings, and vision (VLM-OCR) support.

services.name: Google Vertex AI
services.tagline: Gemini, embeddings, and vision OCR on Google Cloud
services.description: Vertex AI generative and embedding models, plus Gemini multimodal for VLM-OCR.

services.name: Together AI
services.tagline: Hosted open-source models with tool calling
services.description: Together AI APIs for Llama, Mistral and other community models.

services.name: Cohere
services.description: Cohere rerank models (rerank-v3.5, rerank-multilingual-v3.0) for re-ranking retrieval results.

services.name: Jina AI
services.description: Jina AI rerankers (jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual) for re-ranking retrieval results.

services.name: Voyage AI
services.description: Voyage AI rerank models (rerank-2, rerank-2-lite) for re-ranking retrieval results.

services.name: OpenAI-Compatible
services.tagline: Any service exposing the OpenAI REST schema
services.description: Connect Groq, DeepSeek, Mistral, vLLM, Deepgram-OpenAI, ElevenLabs-OpenAI and other compatible APIs — including /v1/audio/* and VLM-based OCR.

services.name: Chroma Cloud
services.description: Managed ChromaDB collections with automatic scaling.

services.name: Chroma (self-hosted)
services.description: Connect to a self-managed ChromaDB cluster.

services.name: Zilliz Cloud
services.description: Managed Milvus clusters operated by Zilliz Cloud.

services.name: Milvus (self-hosted)
services.description: Connect to a self-managed Milvus deployment.

services.name: Elasticsearch Cloud
services.description: Elasticsearch Service with vector search enabled.

services.name: Elasticsearch (self-hosted)
services.description: Connect a self-hosted Elasticsearch deployment.

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.description: Vector indexes via Azure Cognitive Search.

services.name: MongoDB Atlas
services.description: Use MongoDB Atlas Vector Search collections.

services.name: PostgreSQL (pgvector)
services.description: Connect to a Postgres database with the pgvector extension.

services.name: SQLite Vector
services.description: Persistent on-disk vector storage backed by SQLite. Zero configuration — works out of the box without any external service.

services.name: Orama
services.description: Lightweight vector + lexical search engine.

services.name: System Default (S3 Vectors)
services.description: Default vector backend powered by AWS S3 Vectors.

services.name: Amazon S3
services.description: Store ingested files and artifacts in an S3 bucket — AWS S3 or any S3-compatible store (MinIO, Ceph RGW) via a custom endpoint.

services.name: Local filesystem
services.description: Persist files on the same host where Cognipeer runs. Zero configuration — works out of the box without any external service.

services.name: Mistral OCR
services.description: Native OCR endpoint (POST /v1/ocr) with PDF and image extraction, including markdown output.

services.name: Azure Document Intelligence
services.description: Native OCR with layout, table, and key-value extraction. Supports prebuilt-read, prebuilt-layout, prebuilt-document, and custom processors.

services.name: AWS Textract
services.description: Native OCR with text, layout, tables, and forms. modelId selects detect-document-text or analyze-document.

services.name: Google Document AI
services.description: Native OCR via Document AI processors (OCR, Layout, Form Parser). Requires projectId, location, and processorId.

services.name: Bing Web Search
services.tagline: Microsoft Bing Web Search API v7
services.description: Web results from the Microsoft Bing index via Azure Cognitive Services. Requires an Azure subscription key.

services.name: Brave Search
services.description: Web search over Brave's own independent index with a privacy focus. Requires a Brave Search API subscription token.

services.name: Serper
services.description: Fast Google search results (organic results and answer box) through the serper.dev API.

services.name: Tavily
services.description: Search API built for AI agents; returns cleaned content snippets and optional synthesized answers.

services.name: SearxNG
services.description: Privacy-respecting open-source metasearch engine aggregating many engines. Point it at your own instance (JSON format must be enabled).

services.name: DuckDuckGo
services.description: Best-effort search over the DuckDuckGo HTML endpoint. No API key or account required; suitable for light usage.
